P1.name: Gold Factory MVP
P1.entry_gate: P0 core exit plus active-registry governance; provider work requires honest installed states

P2.name: Body-Aware Drafting
P2.entry_gate: P1 core exit; v2 drafting additionally needs inactive v2 authority/migration contracts

P3.name: Specialist Lanes
P3.entry_gate: P2 core exit; modern specialists require governed installed challengers

P4.name: VLM QA & Active Learning
P4.entry_gate: core operational QA/certification uses deterministic invariants, qualified autonomous critics, perturbation, replay, and abstention without human evidence; only the optional independent_real_accuracy profile needs an image-disjoint human-anchor calibration set

P5.name: Custom Model Training
P5.entry_gate: optional/post-core custom-training lane only: its own training authority may require the declared package count and image-disjoint holdout; P5 is not a core_autonomous_runtime prerequisite

P6.name: ComfyUI Integration, Serving & Autonomous Core Bridge
P6.entry_gate: MF-P6-07..12 autonomous-core work has no D6, human, corpus-volume, full-library, DAZ, or soak prerequisite; legacy trained-champion serving lanes retain their own profile-scoped D6/provider gates

P7.name: Scale & Continuous Operation
P7.entry_gate: post-core scale_daz_maturity lane: core closure may precede this phase; scale work requires its own current currency/certificate/rollback evidence

P8.name: Multi-Person / Multi-Character Masking
P8.entry_gate: core multi-person ownership, exclusivity, bleed, contact, and bridge checks may run without P7 scale maturity; optional corpus/headline demonstrations retain their own profile-scoped evidence gates

P9.name: External Supervision, Reference Intelligence & DAZ Autonomy
P9.entry_gate: optional/post-core reference, training, and DAZ maturity work only; its qualified-source, leakage, DAZ, and independent human-anchor claim gates cannot block or revoke core

MF-P2-06.08.description: QC-011 exclusivity clean on all fixtures

notes.text: Live production evidence: S10 generated complete atomic reports for all 29 eligible promoted instances with zero runner failures/temp directories, and QC-011 atomic exclusivity passed 29/29. QC-012/018/019/020/035-038 also passed universally. This does not satisfy the item's exact governed 10-fixture requirement; that fixture set remains unavailable, so the item stays partial.

Corrected live S10 evidence after fixing two adapter defects. QC-013 had tested protected other_person against itself; protected IDs 50-53 are now excluded while body-part overlap remains fail-closed, changing live QC-013 from 21 pass/8 false fail to 29/29 pass. QC-014 now supplies the required pose-skeleton anatomical-chain vote alongside DensePose; agreeing votes pass in regression. Forced rerun completed 29/29 reports with zero temp directories. QC-014 remains 27 fail/2 pass because all 27 contain genuine wrong-side votes and 22 also have at least one insufficient-evidence part; no hard block was overridden. Exact 10-fixture gate remains open.

Failure evidence was reconciled after the adapter correction. S10 producer identity is now stable (s10_autoqa:pN), so append_failure_once deduplicates across random report run IDs. The live queue was reduced from 66 bug-polluted rows to 27 current QC-014 failures: eight obsolete QC-013 false positives and 31 duplicate QC-014 rows removed. A forced repeat left the queue at 27 rows with identical SHA-256. Ontology-v2 evidence was refreshed: none of these QC-014 failures qualifies for a proposed missing-boundary candidate, so v2 remains NO-GO.

Corrected side-aware live production rather than overriding hard blocks. Official DensePose fine-chart sides replaced the inverted mapping; pose-chain geometry now tolerates parser L/R swaps, bounds pathological capsule width, and supplies pose-only fallbacks; paired torso UV supplies breast-side evidence; zero-valued upstream artifacts no longer authorize broad parsers to invent fine hip labels. The ordered 18-source/29-instance S09→S09.5→S10 rebuild completed with no final stage failures. QC-014 improved from 27 fail/2 pass to 16 fail/13 pass; remaining reports contain 10 wrong-side contradictions and 8 insufficient-evidence cases (some overlap), so they remain BLOCK. Queue reconciled 27→16 and ontology v2 remains NO-GO.

Hardened DensePose QC-014 evidence without weakening the gate: side votes now require at least 32 sided pixels, 1% mask coverage, and a 10% majority margin. A full 29-instance artifact audit remained exactly 13 pass / 16 BLOCK with zero verdict changes; trace/weak overlaps become no-vote and therefore remain fail-closed. Full 630-test suite passed; Ruff check/format clean. The exact governed 10-fixture completion gate remains open.

The exact governed 10-fixture set now satisfies QC-011, replacing the prior live-corpus-only partial evidence. Full PART maps were independently expanded to atomic masks and checked; all ten report overlap_px=0. The multi-person padded-context fixture contained 55 co-subject truth pixels but the final p0 body authority claimed zero of them.

Live local execution checkpointed the complete 50-record holdout shard in two contiguous batches, replayed the first batch idempotently, and resumed from a second process with identical queue SHA. Provider-lane crash/restart and 1,000-record milestone remain open.

MF-P4-12.02.description: Run the polygon lane through qualified external-mask comparison, hard QC, strict per-record visual review, repair/abstain, and signed outcomes · Verify: exact source/polygon/mask/panel/provider/verdict lineage for every record · Blocked by: MF-P0-18.03 through MF-P0-18.07, MF-P4-12.01

notes.text: Deterministic full-corpus polygon decode/remap/materialization/alignment hard-QC and reason-coded quarantine are complete and hash-mirrored. Independent-provider comparison, strict per-record VLM panels/verdicts, bounded repair/abstention, and signed outcomes remain open.

Current v6 polygon evidence has explicit per-record source role, direct crosswalk binding, and a 97,833-mask train-role prerequisite manifest. No mask is training-authorized; provider/VLM/repair/certificate gates remain open.

Corrected v4 full-corpus hard QC now covers 39,354 polygon records / 125,976 masks; 37,736 records pass deterministic QC and 1,618 quarantine. A diverse 12-group CPU refinement canary is draft-only. Independent provider, strict per-record VLM, terminal receipt, and certificate gates remain open.

Polygon refinement now accepts a changed draft only when its real-image contour alignment improves, component fragmentation stays bounded, and all prior drift gates pass. Otherwise the exact immutable parent is returned with explicit no-progress/rejection evidence. Provider/VLM/ownership/certificate gates remain open.

All 125,976 polygon masks now use the canonical shape-bound binary identity. Full-corpus rerun quarantined 200 additional records, including 225 duplicate-annotation and 22 cross-label-collapse reason occurrences; 1,319 previously role-eligible masks were removed. Provider/VLM/ownership/certificate gates remain open.

Polygon candidates can no longer reach accepted/repaired terminal state from annotation localization alone. Exact verified person_index/owner/scene-instance ownership bound to source, mask, and report is now mandatory; live polygon ownership remains open.

MF-P4-12.03.description: Generate multi-provider masks from bbox prompts without treating boxes as pixels · Verify: canary proves provider provenance, boundary refinement, hard QC, strict review, and terminal outcomes · Blocked by: MF-P0-18.04, MF-P4-12.01

notes.text: A real 8-record bbox canary is source-hash/geometry/annotation/split-group bound with boxes preserved only as prompts and three governed provider roles selected. GPU provider execution, hard QC, strict review, repair/outcome, and certificate evidence remain open.

MF-P4-12.04.description: Generate multi-provider tournament proposals for CivitAI reference images without source truth · Verify: proposals remain machine candidates and abstain when independent evidence is insufficient · Blocked by: MF-P0-18.04, MF-P4-12.01

notes.text: A real 8-record reference/tournament canary is source-hash/geometry/split-group bound, explicitly carries no source pixel truth, and selects independent discovery/comparison/refinement roles. Proposal execution and qualification remain open.

MF-P4-12.05.description: Require complete source/mask/overlay/contour/ownership evidence and one structured strict-VLM verdict per record · Verify: contact-sheet-only, missing-panel, rubber-stamp, and hard-QC-clear attempts fail · Blocked by: MF-P4-11.18 through MF-P4-11.22 · HARD BLOCKER

notes.text: Fail-closed per-record gate now requires independently hash-verified source/mask/overlay/contour/ownership views, two provider families, hard-QC pass, and two current independent strict-review roles. Contact-sheet substitution, rubber stamps, cross-record panel drift, and hard-QC override fail. Live adult provider/VLM execution remains open.
Direct checkpoint mutation now revalidates every accepted/repaired qualification receipt; the safer wrapper is no longer optional for authority enforcement.

Per-record strict-review evidence now also binds abstain/reject outcomes; two independent roles, complete five-view evidence, reason-coded stage, and no-authority boundary are revalidated before queue mutation.

Per-record adult visual evidence is no longer accepted from file hashes alone. A real 12-record canary now proves source pixels, shape-bound mask pixels, overlay locality, contour locality, ownership-region locality, and common geometry; semantic tampering fails even after recomputing the file SHA. Live independent strict-VLM verdicts remain open.

Accepted, repaired, abstained, and rejected receipts now recompute original-source and five-view pixel semantics before creation and again before queue mutation. Arbitrary hash-valid panels or a missing original source binding cannot cross the authority boundary. Live critic verdicts remain open.

Terminal review evidence now includes a mandatory exact person-instance ownership record in addition to pixel-semantic five-view evidence. Accepted/repaired require verified ownership; ambiguous records cannot claim an owner and route only to nonacceptance. Live critics remain open.

MF-P4-12.06.description: Run bounded automatic repair/no-progress detection and continue-on-exception outcomes · Verify: pass/repair/abstain/quarantine controls preserve immutable parents and do not stall unrelated records · Blocked by: MF-P4-12.02 through MF-P4-12.05

notes.text: Accepted/repaired durable checkpoints now bind immutable parent mask lineage, a maximum of three attempts, and reject identical-mask no-progress repair. Separate abstain/reject failure-receipt execution and live canary remain open.

Continue-on-exception contracts now cover accepted, repaired, abstained, and rejected mask candidates. Abstention requires an uncertain independent verdict; strict-review rejection requires a fail; hard-QC rejection retains the veto; repair exhaustion is bounded to at most three attempts. Quarantined-input/holdout receipts and live execution remain open.

Continue-on-exception accounting now includes registry/shard/source/reason-bound input quarantine and policy/split-group-bound evaluation-only holdout receipts. Every queue terminal outcome is fail-closed; live repair/abstention throughput remains open.

The live CPU refinement path now implements parent-preserving no-progress and regression rejection, rather than returning rejected proposal pixels. A 12-record real canary produced positive boundary gains while synthetic no-evidence input preserved its parent. Full provider/VLM repair-loop execution remains open.

Continue-on-exception hard QC now diverts exact duplicate and cross-label-collapsed annotations into quarantine while unrelated records continue. Exact mask identities bind canvas geometry, preventing ambiguous downstream receipt lineage.

Every candidate terminal path now revalidates the actual source/mask/overlay/contour/ownership pixels, including abstain/reject outcomes, while quarantine/holdout retain their separate no-mask receipts. Live repair and strict-review throughput remain open.

Ownership ambiguity is now a durable abstain/reject condition rather than an implicit acceptance. Queue mutation revalidates source/mask/owner/scene-instance binding and refuses owner claims on ambiguous evidence.

MF-P4-12.07.description: Pass one representative shard from every lane before expansion · Verify: decode, annotation alignment, schema, provenance, hard QC, strict VLM, repair/abstention, resume, and evidence writing are measured · Blocked by: MF-P4-12.01 through MF-P4-12.06

notes.text: The required representative shard selection and intake/decode/alignment/schema/evidence foundation are green for all five lanes. Provider provenance, hard QC, strict VLM, repair/abstention, durable resume, and signed terminal outcomes remain open.

The evaluation-only representative lane now has 50/50 durable terminal receipts, idempotent replay, and second-process resume evidence. Four generation/review lanes still require provider, strict-VLM, repair/abstention, and evidence completion.

Polygon canary now spans 12 corrected unique split groups and multiple anatomy labels across live-photo and illustration domains, with parent/refined evidence. It remains draft-only; four generation/review lanes still need full provider, strict-VLM, repair/abstention, and terminal evidence.

Provider execution manifests now bind 24 real source-verified records across the bbox, bbox-plus-action, and reference lanes, with eight unique v4 groups per lane. GPU execution and strict per-record verdicts remain pending coordinator recovery.

The polygon canary now includes real pixel-boundary nonregression, fragmentation checks, immutable-parent rollback, and visual inspection across 12 unique v4 groups. Independent provider and strict-VLM terminal decisions remain open.

All 12 real polygon canary rows now carry separately verified pixel-semantic five-view evidence. Provider comparison, independent strict-VLM quorum, person-instance ownership, terminal outcomes, and remaining lanes are still open.

notes.text: Original Porn-Blocker-Benchmark v4 holdout is frozen before first evaluation. The validator binds all ordered sample IDs, source hashes, split groups, shard and full split-map hashes, rejects training/critic use, and proves every related group member remains holdout.
All 50 frozen holdout records now also have durable evaluation-only queue receipts; no mask was generated and no training, critic-calibration, or production authority was granted.

Rebound the unchanged original 50-record / 46-group holdout to corrected v4 split mapping SHA256 544672f6d9afb8ae9232323f234593ed47ca48dfb3722416f0a26994b68bfbad. Live validation proves zero cross-partition groups; new durable queue replay is 50/50 and idempotent.
